title: rosa stylosa var. immitis
intro: Rosa stylosa var. immitis, also known as the fragrant rose or Japanese climbing rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, characterized by its fragrant flowers and climbing habit. Traditionally, Rosa stylosa var. immitis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The plant is also known for its potential health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, Rosa stylosa var. immitis can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
